since_last: 32% of 101 AI names green; Powering AI leads +0.76%; AI bubble risk 50 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 32% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -1.42% · BTC -1.89% · Gold -2.37% · Nasdaq100 -2.13%. 32% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Powering AI is doing the heavy lifting at +0.76%.

cards.headline: Powering AI leads, AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Powering AI at +0.76%; weakest is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at -3.09%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: TSLA is the standout at -14.61%
cards.body: Leaders: GEV +5.45%, HON +5.34%, AVAV +5.19%, CBRS +4.28%, MU +2.92%. Laggards: TSLA -14.61%, CRNC -8.05%, GOOGL -6.96%, SYM -5.02%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +1.08% at $116.51
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +1.08% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
